title: Antigravity agent.yaml
description: Validates the agent.yaml configuration file used in this repo's .agents/agents/ directory. Note: agent.yaml is a community convention — official Antigravity permissions are set in the UI (Agent Manager → Settings → Advanced). See docs/antigravity-reference.md.

name.description: Unique agent identifier. PascalCase or kebab-case. Should match the filename (without .yaml).

role.description: Short professional title for this agent. Used in system prompt construction. Aim for clarity over cleverness.

description.description: Full explanation of what this agent does, what it does NOT do, and when to use it. This is the primary way humans (and other agents) understand scope.

auto_load_skills.description: COMMUNITY CONVENTION — not machine-enforced by Antigravity. Documents which skills this agent is expected to use. Must match skill names (kebab-case) present in .agents/skills/.

permissions.description: COMMUNITY DOCUMENTATION — not machine-enforced. Real permissions are set in Antigravity UI: Agent Manager → Settings → Advanced → Terminal. Include this block as human intent documentation only.

browser.description: Whether this agent is intended to have browser access. Corresponds to Antigravity's JavaScript Execution policy.

terminal.description: Whether this agent is intended to execute terminal commands. Corresponds to Antigravity's Terminal Command Auto Execution policy.

file_system.description: Intended file system access level for this agent.

input_artifact.description: Path (relative to workspace root) of the primary file this agent reads as input.

input_artifacts.description: Paths of multiple input files when the agent requires more than one.

output_artifact.description: Path (relative to workspace root) where this agent writes its primary output.
